News

2026 pub award winners announced by Borders MP

Monday, 20 April, 2026
John Lamont MP has announced the winners of his 2026 competition to crown the best pubs in the Scottish Borders. The competition once again attracted a strong response from local residents, with nominations submitted for a wide range of establishments across the region. The overall winner was The Black Swan in Kelso, which received significant support from voters and stood out for its quality...
